mapper.sql: select resource_id, parent_id, resource_name, resource_type, source_system, update_cycle, owner_name, data_count, tags, permission_scope, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from nc_fusion_resource_directory
mapper.insert: insert into nc_fusion_resource_directory (parent_id, resource_name, resource_type, source_system, update_cycle, owner_name, data_count, tags, permission_scope, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values (#{parentId}, #{resourceName}, #{resourceType}, #{sourceSystem}, #{updateCycle}, #{ownerName}, #{dataCount}, #{tags}, #{permissionScope}, coalesce(#{status}, '0'), #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark})
